caption: A man with a bald head, wearing a white collared shirt and a dark blazer, speaks while gesturing with his hands. He is positioned in front of a blurred background that shows a doorway and other individuals sitting and standing. At the bottom of the screen, a graphic banner includes the "theCUBE" logo and the text "From the Javits Center, New York, NY," alongside a "Sponsored By MongoDB" logo. The on-screen text changes between frames; it initially displays "MONGODB WORLD 2022" and "#MDW22 | #theCUBE," then switches to "SANJEEV MOHAN" and "Principal, SanjMo | @SanjMo," before alternating again. Throughout the sequence, the man remains the central focus, moving his hands to emphasize his points as he speaks, while the background figures remain relatively stationary.
